utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final package, all 7 appear. Now we check if each is fully specified: destination (Athens, Greece) – fully specified; travel_dates (October 15–19, 2024) – fully specified; transportation (round-trip flight from UK with cost €160) – fully specified; accommodation (hotel name, rating, 4 nights, cost €400) – fully specified; activities (two listed with names and costs) – fully specified; additional_services (optional taxi and breakfast with costs mentioned) – fully specified; total_budget (€690 confirmed) – fully specified. All items are covered with adequate details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes a destination (Athens, Greece), transportation (Round-trip flight from UK via budget airline, economy class), accommodation (Tranquil Inn), and two activities (Rock Climbing Day Trip to Kalymnos and Scuba Diving Excursion in the Aegean Sea). The ground-truth ratings list 'Athens, Greece' as 7, 'Budget Airlines: Economy Class' as 10, 'Tranquil Inn' as 7, 'Rock Climbing' as 10, and 'Scuba Diving Excursion' as 10. The optional services (airport taxi and premium breakfast) were not included, so they are not mapped.
